sentences.pinyin: Nǐ zuì jìn kàn diàn yǐng le ma?
sentences.text_translation_ru: Ты в последнее время смотрел кино?
sentences.text_translation_en: Have you watched any movies lately?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 看了。我昨天看了一部新电影。
sentences.pinyin: Kàn le. Wǒ zuó tiān kàn le yí bù xīn diàn yǐng.
sentences.text_translation: Ko'rdim. Kecha yangi bir film ko'rdim.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Смотрел. Вчера посмотрел один новый фильм.
sentences.text_translation_en: I did. I watched a new movie yesterday.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.pinyin: Shén me diàn yǐng? Hǎo kàn ma?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 是一部喜剧片，很有意思。
sentences.pinyin: Shì yí bù xǐ jù piàn, hěn yǒu yì si.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.pinyin: Yí ge hěn chū míng de yǎn yuán.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.pinyin: Diàn yǐng jiǎng le shén me?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 讲一个男人和他的狗的故事。
sentences.pinyin: Jiǎng yí ge nán rén hé tā de gǒu de gù shi.
sentences.text_translation: Bir erkak va uning iti haqidagi hikoya.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Это история об одном мужчине и его собаке.
sentences.text_translation_en: It tells the story of a man and his dog.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.pinyin: Tīng qǐ lái hěn gǎn rén.
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.pinyin: Duì. Wǒ chà diǎnr kū le.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.pinyin: Diàn yǐng piào guì bu guì?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.pinyin: Bú guì. Wǎng shàng mǎi piào gèng pián yi.
sentences.text_translation: Qimmat emas. Internetdan chipta olsa arzonroq.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Не дорогие. Покупать билеты онлайн ещё дешевле.
sentences.text_translation_en: Not expensive. Buying tickets online is even cheaper.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 你平时喜欢看什么类型的电影？
sentences.pinyin: Nǐ píng shí xǐ huan kàn shén me lèi xíng de diàn yǐng?
sentences.text_translation_ru: Какие жанры фильмов ты обычно любишь?
sentences.text_translation_en: What kinds of movies do you usually like?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 我喜欢看爱情片和动画片。
sentences.pinyin: Wǒ xǐ huan kàn ài qíng piàn hé dòng huà piàn.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Я люблю романтические фильмы и мультфильмы.
sentences.text_translation_en: I like romance films and animated films.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 爱情片我也喜欢。最近有一部新的，听说很好看。
sentences.pinyin: Ài qíng piàn wǒ yě xǐ huan. Zuì jìn yǒu yí bù xīn de, tīng shuō hěn hǎo kàn.
sentences.text_translation: Sevgi filmlarini men ham yoqtiraman. Yaqinda yangisi chiqibdi, juda yaxshi deyishyapti.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Романтические фильмы я тоже люблю. Недавно вышел новый, говорят, очень хороший.
sentences.text_translation_en: I like romance films too. There's a new one out — I hear it's really good.
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 那太好了！你看了以后告诉我好不好看。
sentences.pinyin: Nà tài hǎo le! Nǐ kàn le yǐ hòu gào su wǒ hǎo bu hǎo kàn.
sentences.text_translation: Juda yaxshi! Ko'rgandan keyin yaxshi-yomonligini menga ayt.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Отлично! Посмотришь — расскажи, хороший ли он.
sentences.text_translation_en: Great! After you watch it, tell me if it's good.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.pinyin: Méi wèn tí. Wǒ zhōu mò jiù qù kàn.
sentences.text_translation: Muammo yo'q. Dam olish kunlari borib ko'raman.
sentences.text_translation_en: No problem. I'll go see it this weekend.
sentences.speaker: A
